    252.Astarion: Gods, this is nice. Fresh air, no hordes of demons trying to kill us - this plane does have its benefits.END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHellKarlachEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Astarion

        188.Astarion: I'm glad. It would be so easy to go through everything we did and come out the other side bitter and twisted.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 66a2d5c6-68db-1fdf-7c9c-863d8f69f428Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he3318f44g0564g410ag932cg256fdf5ae4a4Text UUID: 60371ba7-4895-488b-9bf6-26e700824d2eTimeline Phase Index: 130Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 66a2d5c6-68db-1fdf-7c9c-863d8f69f428Timeline Phase Duration: 18.58sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1338.31s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1339.96s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1342.76s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1345.08s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 24Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1345.91s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 25Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1346.89s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1349.05s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1350.31s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1354.33s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1355.23s | speaker 1 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1355.35s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1355.53s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 1 [1338.31s-1356.2s] | @ 1355.98s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryGroup ID: 66a2d5c6-68db-1fdf-7c9c-863d8f69f428Group Index: 0

          31.Astarion: But they deserve happiness. We all do. And I will forever be grateful to have found it with you.

          Metadata

              77.Astarion: Tempting, but you make a better ambassador for us than I do. I'll keep skulking here - I do it well, after all.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2a74841a-73d3-2457-fa2a-a55b9048a37fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: ha0af9212gfcaeg4f71g8a7fgcb2f204468b7Text UUID: 6831f381-9248-4b43-82ff-7a901f6f193bTimeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2a74841a-73d3-2457-fa2a-a55b9048a37fTimeline Phase Duration: 11.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1007.98s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1008.38s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1009.87s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1010.58s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1013.39s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1015.98s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1007.65s-1018.31s] | @ 1016.39s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1018.31s-1019.48s] | @ 1018.31s | speaker 1 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1018.31s-1019.48s] | @ 1018.75s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1018.31s-1019.48s] | @ 1019.21s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [1018.31s-1019.48s] | @ 1019.29s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicry

                    229.Astarion: I'm sorry I didn't seek you out that night. I felt... ashamed. Like I'd lost everything, just as you claimed your victory. I didn't want you to see me like that.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7cae2f6e-c485-a1fc-ca59-179cfaeb7f14Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h10d53f70g9dbdg4e32g8b42g4bc63162c46eText UUID: 6f9cec1e-c6a7-4cca-91e0-08a4afc02c16Group ID: d273a13e-15c7-80ef-a798-f3bbea6db96bGroup Index: 1
                    • +
                      361.Astarion: And with Cazador still out there, I could hardly show my face. So I retreated to the sewers to hide, bide my time, and enjoy all the rats one can eat.!ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated!ORI_Astarion_State_HuntingCazador

                      192.Astarion: But time lent perspective. It wasn't your victory, it was ours. And for all I'd lost, I had gained so much more. I had freedom, strength - a whole new life. And it was time to live it.

                      Text

                      But time lent perspective. It wasn't your victory, it was ours. And for all I'd lost, I had gained so much more. I had freedom, strength - a whole new life. And it was time to live it.
                      h9c7f7d0agdbf9g4fb3gb54eg96dd414fa622 | 0d81702a-7fff-457a-adec-06fe0e80b8bb | stub

                      Metadata

                          264.Astarion: It turns out, it's every bit as dangerous travelling alone as it was travelling with you. I've killed more beasts and bandits than I can count.

                                          320.Astarion: You know it's funny, at first I thought I was trapped by the shadows - cursed to live in them forever.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a91deee0-3460-bf66-9ec0-edbfef1e28b7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he1f6e082g65eag467dgba95g3897d72d0d02Text UUID: 44df9ae4-b472-42e5-99d9-85a1a8183856Group ID: d8123e9c-e5b9-1af2-6f86-b6e51c4934e0Group Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            76.Astarion: But in time, I realised that darkness is as much a part of me as my fangs. This is only a curse as long as I refuse to embrace the shadows. So I decided I would.

                                              174.Astarion: I decided not to be defined by the choices other people made - by what other people did to me. My past may be done, but my present - my future - they're mine.

                                          412.Astarion: Don't get me wrong, I was a mess at first. Every day I yearned for the sun and mourned my curse to live in the shadows.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: de20b7fe-6438-a73f-9474-271f2767f4a4Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf39476b0gcda3g42b1g85d2gde49894ff251Text UUID: 426a2c28-e06f-4f3f-af21-27dadc5a93b1Group ID: 74f10def-dd3d-9b41-2845-147728dd8eeaGroup Index: 1
                                          • See Node 76 (Astarion) But in time, I realised that darkness is as much a part of me as my fangs. This is only a curse as long as I refuse to embrace the shadows. So I decided I would.
                            • +

                                      452.Astarion: Likewise, if you'd believe it.

                                      225.Astarion: Perhaps, but we're trying not to get our hopes up.

                                      • +
                                        307.Astarion: We found some blueprints and a map to Zariel's private forge, so if we can find a smith, and get the materials, and it's not a trap - there's a chance.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a07cf5e3-b4b4-6157-b4df-9fc9513fea8eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h040ae539gcc16g4eacga018ga884b5f4229dText UUID: b242eee9-5b14-46d4-ab88-6b88448b2c5bGroup ID: 79dc07bd-1a5c-84be-20db-5485b7bc3df6Group Index: 1
                                        • •
                                          18.Astarion: But however it turns out, this isn't the last Faerûn has seen of us. Sooner or later, we will be back.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0aec6d32-2e6e-1ceb-ebeb-72f8540612a9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6918b660g3034g44d1gb83eg74a99b77f61cText UUID: 245f20c5-25b0-4b31-a665-0f7fcd70ab62Group ID: 79dc07bd-1a5c-84be-20db-5485b7bc3df6Group Index: 2

                        • +
                          332.Astarion: There are thousands of vampire spawn in the Underdark - lost souls I lured into the shadows. The least I could do was give them a place they'd be safe.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2eac308-5eae-a3fe-4359-56f6e331c7a7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h89338674g7138g44e0g87ceg04e3a8649234Text UUID: 36e1766f-e6c4-4457-bb13-a6aa48bf8096Group ID: 4c5fe28b-28b4-e20c-3b78-ead40f602bbcGroup Index: 1
                          • +
                            30.Astarion: So I've been building a haven down there. It's relatively small for now, but growing every day as more and more spawn find us.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 13c573dc-0fc1-7eb9-2800-36224dc86778Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6b77287ega077g4f26g918fgec1b1d3d72ddText UUID: 89ff4ef8-b802-4098-ae1e-16f819ec7287Group ID: 4c5fe28b-28b4-e20c-3b78-ead40f602bbcGroup Index: 2
                            • +

| mimicryTimeline Emotion 23: Shot 1 [721.88s-728.4s] | @ 721.88s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Group ID: cabead1e-e629-330f-d6fb-85b4b98749faGroup Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          449.Astarion: Every sin-stained furnishing, every last trace of Cazador - it all burned.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f979e9b7-19ee-baca-e0d5-e7fbb29a0c3fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: haf1c0897gfa62g410cga82fg9c085f59af71Text UUID: c7184957-6dba-4205-ac76-97d788b4c827Group ID: cabead1e-e629-330f-d6fb-85b4b98749faGroup Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            356.Astarion: And when the structure finally gave way, it collapsed into the wretched chapel below. Every record of his infernal ritual is gone - we'll never see its like again.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c101917e-db55-a9ff-4340-c071126218dfSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h689693d0gbd1bg4d3fga0f1g7258a8296e8cText UUID: 66691096-6750-48c0-b762-1a0fc2e64011Group ID: cabead1e-e629-330f-d6fb-85b4b98749faGroup Index: 2
                                            • +

                                              • +
                                                243.Astarion: Rather easily, actually. It turns out there are more than enough things willing to attack you in the Underdark.

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 826c9e3a-8698-69f3-04e6-2f828149881dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h74aedc7cgd71cg4930g9113gc281497bbaf9Text UUID: 3493163b-255c-454f-8917-d857325fb0ecTimeline Phase Index: 34Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 826c9e3a-8698-69f3-04e6-2f828149881dTimeline Phase Duration: 11.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [342.27s-353.45s] | @ 344.5s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [342.27s-353.45s] | @ 345.55s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [342.27s-353.45s] | @ 347.27s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [342.27s-353.45s] | @ 348.14s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [342.27s-353.45s] | @ 351.23s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [342.27s-353.45s] | @ 352.25s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained FalseGroup ID: 826c9e3a-8698-69f3-04e6-2f828149881dGroup Index: 0
                                                • +
                                                  274.Astarion: And if they find themselves on the wrong end of someone's fangs, that's on them.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  • +

                                                      285.Astarion: I did at first, but then I realised - these shadows, this darkness - it's all part of me.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 939a081d-628b-8302-7d5f-eef368c461dcSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: ha63cf135g42cfg4f9cg96f0g15c95da9c484Text UUID: 402aee2d-1be3-47cb-ac69-600bb4270a1eTimeline Phase Index: 13Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 939a081d-628b-8302-7d5f-eef368c461dcTimeline Phase Duration: 17.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 102.42s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 105.11s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 107.36s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 108.77s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 109.98s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 113.61s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 114.98s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 116.74s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 116.92s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 117.31s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 117.37s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [102.42s-119.43s] | @ 118.23s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained FalseGroup ID: 939a081d-628b-8302-7d5f-eef368c461dcGroup Index: 0
                                                      • +
                                                        289.Astarion: I spent too long defined by what other people did to me. The choices other people made for me - but that's over now.

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 95be788e-8808-8ee0-b8f4-b54eda136c6bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2743265dg1779g45aagbab0g66836a08afccText UUID: 7b9fa492-a290-4a40-831e-29f07b359e8dGroup ID: 939a081d-628b-8302-7d5f-eef368c461dcGroup Index: 1
                                                        • +
                                                          319.Astarion: This is who I am. In all my glory, for better and for worse.

                                                          Metadata

                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8c74f23-b632-831a-5b38-65825702149bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc3aef32bg3984g4866gaee9g37741f581deaText UUID: 76fcb109-9ba9-4003-b24c-c4221238746aTimeline Phase Index: 19Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a8c74f23-b632-831a-5b38-65825702149bTimeline Phase Duration: 9.48sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 160.77s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 162.14s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 164.07s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 165.64s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 166.77s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 167.8s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 168.29s | speaker 1 | emotion unchanged | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 168.53s | peanut slot 0 | emotion unchanged | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 168.75s | peanut slot 2 | emotion unchanged | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [160.44s-169.5s] | @ 169.01s | peanut slot 1 | emotion unchanged | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 1 [169.92s-185.11s] | @ 169.92s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23

                                                              304.Astarion: That being said, I haven't completely given up on returning to the sun. If the opportunity presented itself - well, I wouldn't say no...

                                                              Metadata

                                                                    369.Astarion: From the moment I first threatened you, I knew you were someone special. Someone to take on the world with.

                                                                    Metadata

                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c61995ad-ef35-b24c-bc51-4b0ec40e7ed3Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb4bdb6bcgabc3g478ag9958gec7f3b581cb6Text UUID: 3d8ca379-bdef-40ea-84c9-0a01055b2c59Group ID: 863b743f-d57b-1667-13ba-85eaf8085e5cGroup Index: 1
                                                                    • +

                                                                      • •

                  152.Astarion: Yes, no, of course - I'm very busy too.

              108.Astarion: There was a time when I would have done anything to have what you have. But now? I think I would have felt more chained than charmed.

              Metadata

              189.Astarion: Yes, I suppose you're above the baser pleasures of life now. A pity: they're often the most fun.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6819be13-d4f9-edcf-7701-2441de53384bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6e9b6ab6g2a67g4107gb56bga0113bb49835Text UUID: 28120221-ac68-4895-ab04-e5841a67a27eTimeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6819be13-d4f9-edcf-7701-2441de53384bTimeline Phase Duration: 10.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1566.63s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1568.18s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1571.49s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1572.41s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1574.24s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1575.24s | speaker 1 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1575.54s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1575.63s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1566.63s-1575.88s] | @ 1575.71s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicry
              • See Node 336 (Astarion) Don't get me wrong, I am happy for you. It's just that I'm happy for myself too.

        316.Astarion: And I hear you're doing well. Leading your church, bringing the good word of loss to all that need it - you've been busy. I was worried you might not make it tonight.ORI_Shadowheart_State_Shar_KilledParentsShadowheart

              114.Astarion: I'm glad there are some limits. You can give up a lot, but lose everything and you lose yourself entirely.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4067465f-8a98-99d0-ab0e-5252eebe42f1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2b883513g9fd3g4043g8cafg141908359c0fText UUID: d7459860-60fd-4185-a1df-0f8c08584e9bTimeline Phase Index: 163Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4067465f-8a98-99d0-ab0e-5252eebe42f1Timeline Phase Duration: 13.59sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1699.33s-1707.37s] | @ 1699.33s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1699.33s-1707.37s] | @ 1700.01s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1699.33s-1707.37s] | @ 1700.93s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1699.33s-1707.37s] | @ 1702.13s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1699.33s-1707.37s] | @ 1703.34s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1699.33s-1707.37s] | @ 1705.1s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1707.37s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1709.59s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1709.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1711.15s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1711.82s | speaker 1 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1711.92s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [1707.37s-1712.01s] | @ 1712s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 3 [1712.01s-1712.92s] | @ 1712.25s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryGroup ID: 4067465f-8a98-99d0-ab0e-5252eebe42f1Group Index: 0

                202.Astarion: And that would be a shame, because I've rather enjoyed our time together.

                Metadata

                • +
                  165.Astarion: Well, no, not 'enjoyed' exactly. But you did grow on me over time. Like a night orchid.!Approval_AtLeast_30_For_Sp2

              423.Astarion: I am very glad to hear it. After all, I rather enjoyed our time together.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e8b432a9-17b0-2c37-e5b6-b68b1effb4c6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hdcfee9acge384g4749gab88g6e5c1bfa4122Text UUID: 11ca9329-4452-4b55-a96f-f0e253084561Timeline Phase Index: 55Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e8b432a9-17b0-2c37-e5b6-b68b1effb4c6Timeline Phase Duration: 6.83sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 557.38s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 557.89s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 559.89s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 560.52s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 561.86s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 562.77s | speaker 1 | Happy (2) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 562.99s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 563.06s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [557.38s-563.6s] | @ 563.3s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [563.6s-564.21s] | @ 563.6s | speaker 1 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [563.6s-564.21s] | @ 564s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicry
              • See Node 165 (Astarion) Well, no, not 'enjoyed' exactly. But you did grow on me over time. Like a night orchid.
              • See Node 87 (Astarion) Granted, it was a little... tense at the beginning. But once we got past the threats and the many secrets, you did grow on me. Like a night orchid.

            266.Astarion: That's a good war to fight, though a difficult one to win. There's always more evil out there, my friend.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8caf34fb-b453-17e8-06ea-e9c5ce3ddb0dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h29ac51b8g2c28g4dd2gaf68g65071ce76a0aText UUID: fe1e7619-dcea-42c6-a2a9-4d949fdd6524Timeline Phase Index: 25Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8caf34fb-b453-17e8-06ea-e9c5ce3ddb0dTimeline Phase Duration: 8.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [220.58s-229.23s] | @ 223.08s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [220.58s-229.23s] | @ 224.86s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 23Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [220.58s-229.23s] | @ 225.6s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [229.23s-232.11s] | @ 229.23s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1
            • +
              5.Astarion: But let's not dwell on gloom - we've had enough of that already. Tonight is about celebrating past victories and toasting future triumphs.

              Metadata

                  281.Astarion: Not that I was worried, of course - I knew you'd have this under control.note: Shot from behind, we can see Astarion was clutching a dagger behind his back.

                  Metadata

                    459.Astarion: But I am glad to see you doing well. I'm glad to see us all doing well, in fact. Things turned out rather nicely in the end.note: Astarion subtly puts away the dagger and both hands go back to their normal positions.

                    Metadata

    Node Type: Visual StateUUID: 7fb9d862-4b35-d14b-d648-eabe2d19d267
    • See Node 58 (Astarion) Don't tell me you want to get back to the fight already? Relax, my love - enjoy yourself.
    • See Node 252 (Astarion) Gods, this is nice. Fresh air, no hordes of demons trying to kill us - this plane does have its benefits.
    • See Node 261 (Astarion) I'm flattered by the attention, darling, but don't you want to check in with some of our erstwhile companions? I'm sure they've missed you.
    • See Node 28 (Astarion) Go on, talk to the others. We have forever, after all.
    • See Node 9 (Astarion) And? How have our friends fared without us?
